ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "recipe_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipe */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the recipe (e.g., Per-Piece, Per-Batch) */,
  "too_much" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the recipe is flagged as 'Too Much' for certain ingredients */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the recipe was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the recipe was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recipe */,
  "servings" INTEGER /* Number of servings the recipe yields */,
  "cooking_time" TEXT /* Cooking time required for the recipe */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the recipe image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutritional_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutritional value entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the nutritional values were recorded */,
  "cps" REAL /* Calories per serving */,
  "cd" REAL /* Calories per 100g */,
  "sp_r" TEXT /* Special requirements or notes */,
  "fat" REAL /* Fat content per serving */,
  "carbohydrates" REAL /* Carbohydrates per serving */,
  "protein" REAL /* Protein per serving */,
  "sodium" REAL /* Sodium per serving */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutritional_values_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ingredient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the ingredient was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the ingredient was last updated */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the ingredient */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the ingredient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredients_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the supplier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the supplier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_ingredients" (
  "recipe_ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe-ingredient relationship */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient used in the recipe */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_ingredients_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_ingredients_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the quality metrics were recorded */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_metrics_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe version */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the recipe */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_versions_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the recipe */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the recipe was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., nutritional, quality) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_comments_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the recipe */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_ratings_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_reviews_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
